This should produce smaller images than the SVG format, especially for high resolution pictures.

Similar to https://github.com/NumericalEarth/Breeze.jl/pull/238.  Ref #5027.
title: [docs] Use PNG format for CairoMakie images

body: Follow up to #5031, ref https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/5031#issuecomment-3634569461.  Figures in https://clima.github.io/OceananigansDocumentation/dev/grids/ and https://clima.github.io/OceananigansDocumentation/dev/fields/ are still in SVG format (but they are 840 kB total, not a huge deal)
title: [docs] Use PNG figures in more places

title: (v0.102.3) Fix NetCDF outputs on vertically stretched lat-lon grids, test non-hydrostatic η output, and fix non-hydrostatic free surface time stepping

body:
This generalization is necessary to support "mass advection" of scalars, in which the mass-specific scalar distribution is reconstructed (as opposed to the scalar density). The generalize is needed because th bounded WENO functions do not follow the common form implemented by the other advection schemes.

Note, as far as I can tell, the fact that this is implemented differently is not strictly necessary. However, it avoids repeating some computations? @simone-silvestri if you can confirm this motivation for writing the code this way, I will add a note.

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

title: Generalize bounded WENO advection
